questions.name: DSA - Arrays: Efficiency of Duplicate Search
questions.questiontext: Evaluate the two given methods for checking if an array contains duplicates. Which algorithm is more time-efficient? Justify your answer.

questions.name: DSA - Recursion: Fibonacci: Recursion vs Dynamic Programming
questions.questiontext: Compare the two functions for computing the Fibonacci number. Which algorithm is more time-efficient? Justify your answer.
